_comment: ADMIN: This file controls the availability calendars on the website. Each cabin has a list of bookings. 'start' = check-in date, 'end' = check-out date (the check-out date itself shows as FREE, same as Airbnb iCal). Dates are YYYY-MM-DD. Add, edit, or delete entries then save — the site updates instantly. When the GitHub Action sync is set up (see Admin & Launch Guide), this file is regenerated automatically from your Airbnb/Booking.com calendars every 6 hours.
